summary: First frontend testing pass of Empire luxury digital menu (frontend-only, no backend). End-to-end flow verified: entrance sequence → book cover → all 17 category pages → dish detail modal → search → category nav drawer → veg/non-veg filter → keyboard shortcuts → responsive mobile layout. All acceptance criteria PASS. No React errors, no console errors. prefers-reduced-motion CSS rule confirmed present in index.css. All key elements have data-testid and aria-label attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: BookCover is rendered twice in DOM (desktop `hidden md:flex` + mobile `md:hidden`) — both nodes carry data-testid="book-cover" and data-testid="cover-open-btn". Playwright strict-mode selectors need `.first` / `:visible`. Not a functional bug, but consider conditional rendering (single BookCover) or scoping the testid to distinguish variants.
MenuBook.jsx spans 332 lines — still under 700 threshold but growing; the inline `PageFlip` / `LeftSpreadPage` helpers could be split out for maintainability.

FoodDetailModal backdrop covers the whole viewport but the article card sits over its center. Clicking the visible dimmed corners closes the modal (works correctly), but automated tests targeting `[data-testid="modal-backdrop"]` at element-center will hit the card — non-critical but consider adding a data-testid on a corner-safe click target or moving the onClose to a wrapping div using pointer-events.
verified_features: Entrance 4-phase sequence: particles, brand reveal, book rise, Open Menu CTA appears (~5s).
open-menu-btn transitions from entrance to book stage; BookCover with 'EMPIRE' gold text visible.
cover-open-btn opens the book to Chef's Welcome (page 1/17).

Sequential next-page-btn walks Chef's Welcome → Today's Special → Seasonal Specials → Festival Specials → Starters → Soups → Salads → Main Course → Pizza → Pasta → Burgers → Sandwiches → Desserts → Coffee → Tea → Cold Beverages → Signature Drinks. page-indicator updates on every click. All 17 category names unique.
Category navigation drawer opens via nav-open-btn; nav-cat-{starters|main-course|desserts|signature-drinks} jump to correct pages; category-nav-close-btn closes drawer.
Search overlay: search-open-btn opens overlay; typing 'truffle' filters to relevant dishes; clicking search-result-{id} closes overlay, navigates to dish category and opens FoodDetailModal.

FoodDetailModal shows hero image, name, price with ₹ symbol (modal-price), veg/non-veg pill, spice, prep time, ingredients pills (modal-ingredients), and modal-close-btn. Backdrop click (on empty region) and Escape both close the modal.
Filter Bar: filter-veg-btn shows only veg dishes (4 veg, 0 non-veg on Starters); filter-nonveg-btn shows only non-veg dishes (7 non-veg, 0 veg); filter-all-btn restores all.
Keyboard: ArrowRight advances page, ArrowLeft goes back, '/' opens search, Escape closes modal/search.
Responsive: 1440x900 renders 2-page book spread (left decorative + right current page). 390x844 mobile renders single page layout with dish list, prices right-aligned and dotted leaders.
prefers-reduced-motion @media rule confirmed in /app/frontend/src/index.css disables .dust-particle animation and reduces all animation/transition durations to 0.001ms.
Aria-labels present on prev-page-btn ('Previous page'), next-page-btn ('Next page'), search-open-btn ('Open search'), nav-open-btn ('Category navigation'), and modal-close-btn ('Close details').
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a static frontend-only React CRA. Note: BookCover and its data-testid are duplicated in DOM (desktop + mobile variants) — always scope with `.first` or `:visible`. To test the modal backdrop close via Playwright, use `.bounding_box()` + `mouse.click(x+30, y+30)` because element-center of the full-viewport backdrop overlaps the modal card. Category nav & modal exit animations take ~500-800ms via framer-motion springs; use ~1500ms wait to confirm removal from DOM. All 17 categories confirmed present in /app/frontend/src/data/menu.js. Prices are in ₹ (INR).
